title: GLAKER Professional Hair Clippers Men + T-Blade Trimmer Kit - Cordless Hair Cutting Kits with 13 Premium Guards, Complete Barber Kit with Large LED Display for Mens Grooming
features: THE ONLY BARBER KIT YOU NEED - Say goodbye to your old hair trimmers. GLAKER K11S+I3F clippers and trimmer combo has the power you need for a snag-free hair trimming experience. With 300 minutes of run time, this premium clipper is great for travel, vacation & business trips etc.

EXQUISITE TRIMMING EXPERIENCE - GLAKER cordless hair clippers adopt heavy duty motor providing sufficient power ( 6000 rpm) while keeping operation noise level below 65dB, which is suitable for users with different hair types & at different age ranges. Besides, 440c stainless steel cutting blades is perfect for people with coarse hair.

PREMIUM QUALITY ABOVE STANDARD - With this barber clippers, you could enjoy a hair trimming experience as smooth as butter. Featured taper lever provides adjustable lengths makes it easy to fade and blend. Precise T blade trimmer could create clean lines and exact edges while trimming hair, beard, sideburns, and mustache.

THOUGHTFUL DESIGN - This wireless haircutting kits adopt ergonomic metal casing with alveolate texture on the back of the handle, which offers sturdy and firm grip for professional barbers and stylists. With large LED display, you could be capble of real-time status of this barber kit.

WITNESS YOUR TRANSFORMATION - GLAKER is a cutting-edge brand dedicated to meeting all mens grooming needs. We value feedback of every client and strive to deliver a fantastic grooming experience. Our barber kits have been rigorously tested by numerous cosmetologists to ensure the latest & most innovative designs. Our commitment to quality & service is unmatched, and we're confident you'll be impressed with the results. If you encounter any grooming issues, we are always ready & willing to help.

Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:31 Loaded : 19.37% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:31   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. hair clippers Merchant video Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Can you wash it water after a cut? How do you get all the hair out of the blades after a cut? There is a small cleansing brush along with the barber kit for blade cleansing. Please do NOT immerse the clippers into water or put it under tap as they are NOT waterproof. Does this barber kit come with a wall charger? No, wall charger is not available. USB cable * 2 are included. It is recommended to use a 5V 1A adapter for charging. Is the trimmer really sharp? Because I’m gonna use it to do my lines. Yes, this clippers and trimmer set adopts 440c stainless steel blades, which is pretty sharp. Is this t blade trimmer zero gap? As for the t blade trimmer you inquired, the closest shave it could give is 0.1mm, which is perfect for fading, blending & carving. Besides, it is much safer as it won't hurt your scalp during carving. Is it normal clippers' blade getting a little bit hot after a few minutes continuous hair trimming? It is normal that the blade temperature will rise a little bit after about 20 minutes continous using. It is recommended to apply 2 to 3 drop of blade oil before use which could effectively prevent blade from heating.
